args.query: SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.newvalue__c, ch.oldvalue__c, ch.createddate FROM casehistory__c ch JOIN "Case" c ON c.id=ch.caseid__c WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02';

exec_args.sql: SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.newvalue__c, ch.oldvalue__c, ch.createddate FROM casehistory__c ch JOIN "Case" c ON c.id=ch.caseid__c WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02';

args.query:
WITH oa AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.newvalue__c as agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
),
case_oa_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c, COUNT(*) as oa_count, MIN(ch.newvalue__c) as owner_agent
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM oa
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 1
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, co.owner_agent as agent_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamptz - c.createddate::timestamptz)) as handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_oa_counts co ON co.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE co.oa_count = 1 AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
)
SELECT nt.agent_id, AVG(nt.handle_seconds) as avg_handle_seconds
FROM non_transferred_cases nt
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = nt.agent_id
GROUP BY nt.agent_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH oa AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.newvalue__c as agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
),
case_oa_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c, COUNT(*) as oa_count, MIN(ch.newvalue__c) as owner_agent
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) as cases_handled
  FROM oa
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) > 1
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.createddate, c.closeddate, co.owner_agent as agent_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamptz - c.createddate::timestamptz)) as handle_seconds
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_oa_counts co ON co.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE co.oa_count = 1 AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
)
SELECT nt.agent_id, AVG(nt.handle_seconds) as avg_handle_seconds
FROM non_transferred_cases nt
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = nt.agent_id
GROUP BY nt.agent_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c as agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) as cases_handled
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) > 1;

args.query: SELECT * FROM casehistory__c WHERE createddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' ORDER BY createddate;

exec_args.sql: SELECT * FROM casehistory__c WHERE createddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' ORDER BY createddate;

args.query: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' ORDER BY closeddate;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02' ORDER BY closeddate;

args.query:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c as agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) as cases_handled
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
ORDER BY cases_handled DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ch.newvalue__c as agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) as cases_handled
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND c.closeddate BETWEEN '2023-05-02' AND '2023-09-02'
GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
ORDER BY cases_handled DESC;
